summary: A three-tiered, rounded rectangular wooden building with stonebrick trim and layered horizontal ledges, set inside a square dirt/terracotta plot with a low stonebrick perimeter and a central raised stone platform on the roof. Visible materials: oak planks walls, vertical oak logs as corner/column accents, stonebrick (and stonebrick slabs) for horizontal bands/ledges and short fence-like edging, glass windows in horizontal rows, a dark (nether) flat roof surface with a small glass-and-wood roof lantern/lightroom centered on top.

shape.overall_form: stacked, stepped tiers forming an approximated rounded rectangle (octagonal corners) with repetitive horizontal bands
shape.symmetry: mostly symmetrical on the long axis with repeated tier offsets; asymmetry present at one corner (stair/entrance structure)

materials.name: nether
materials.role: roof_surface (dark purple blocks, likely nether_brick or netherrack)

materials.name: fence
materials.role: small decorative posts around roof lantern (uncertain whether fence or iron bars)

elements: horizontal windows in rows on each tier
stonebrick ledges separating tiers (two or three prominent bands)
vertical stonebrick corner/column features extending through bands
rounded/octagonal corners produced by stepped stonebrick
flat dark roof with central raised square stone platform topped by glow/sea-lantern
external short stonebrick block border around plot and spaced stonebrick pads
rebuild_hints: Construct a rectangular footprint then chamfer the corners into stepped, octagonal-like curves using single-block offsets to match the rounded appearance.

Build three stacked tiers: each tier set inward by 1–2 blocks from the lower tier; separate tiers with a stonebrick slab/row ledge and place vertical oak logs at regular intervals along faces for ribbing.

Use horizontal rows of glass (single-block tall) centered on each tier face; top roof surface use dark nether-style blocks with a centered 5x5 (approx) smooth stone platform and a small glazed wooden lantern on top.

Surround the build with a one-block-high boundary of stonebrick blocks spaced with one-block gaps matching the exterior pattern seen; set the whole onto a flat dirt/terracotta base within a raised perimeter.
uncertainties: Exact block types for the dark roof: looks like nether_brick or netherrack; cannot be certain (listed as 'nether' above).
Small posts around the rooftop lantern could be fence or iron bars; texture is small and ambiguous.
Precise internal layout and whether tiers are full floors or decorative facades cannot be determined from exterior-only views.
Exact footprint dimensions and block counts are estimated from images and may vary by a few blocks in width/depth/height.
